hero.title: Radiant Waves Media Morning Global News
hero.description: Monday, July 6, 2026. Good morning. Here are today's leading global headlines, FIFA World Cup Round of 16 updates, business, politics and security news from around the world.

breaking: 🔴 Norway shock Brazil 2-1 to book FIFA World Cup quarter-final place
🔴 France edge Paraguay 1-0 to reach the quarter-finals
🔴 Morocco eliminate Canada to continue remarkable World Cup run
🔴 Portugal face Spain while USA meet Belgium in today's Round of 16 fixtures
🔴 Europe remains under heatwave warnings across several countries
🔴 Middle East diplomatic efforts continue amid regional tensions
🔴 Nigeria sustains nationwide operations against terrorists and kidnappers
🔴 Global markets begin the week focused on inflation, oil prices and economic growth

featured.title: World Cup Quarter-Final Race Intensifies
featured.content: The FIFA World Cup Round of 16 produced more surprises as Norway eliminated five-time champions Brazil 2-1, France defeated Paraguay 1-0, and Morocco overcame Canada to reach the quarter-finals. Attention now turns to today's heavyweight clashes between Portugal and Spain, and the United States against Belgium as the knockout stage continues.

articles.title: Norway Eliminate Brazil
articles.description: Norway defeated Brazil 2-1 to reach the FIFA World Cup quarter-finals. Erling Haaland scored twice as Brazil suffered another disappointing early exit from the tournament.

articles.title: France Reach Quarter-Finals
articles.description: France secured a hard-fought 1-0 victory over Paraguay to book a place in the quarter-finals. Les Bleus remain among the favourites to lift the World Cup.

articles.title: Morocco Continue Historic Run
articles.description: Morocco defeated Canada 3-0 to qualify for the FIFA World Cup quarter-finals, extending another impressive campaign on the world stage.

articles.title: Today's FIFA World Cup Fixtures
articles.description: Portugal face Spain in Dallas while hosts United States take on Belgium in Seattle as the Round of 16 continues.

articles.title: Confirmed Quarter-Finalists
articles.description: France, Norway and Morocco have secured places in the FIFA World Cup quarter-finals, with more teams to be confirmed after today's matches.

articles.title: Middle East Diplomacy Continues
articles.description: Regional leaders continue diplomatic engagement aimed at reducing tensions, improving humanitarian access and strengthening regional stability.

articles.title: Europe Faces Continuing Heatwave
articles.description: Extreme temperatures continue affecting parts of southern and western Europe as authorities maintain health and wildfire alerts.

articles.title: United States Ready For Belgium Test
articles.description: The United States prepares for a crucial Round of 16 encounter with Belgium as home supporters anticipate another major knockout match.

articles.title: China Expands Technology Investment
articles.description: China continues increasing investment in artificial intelligence, semiconductor manufacturing and advanced industrial technology.

articles.title: Nigeria Sustains Security Operations
articles.description: Military operations against insurgents, bandits and kidnapping gangs continue across several parts of Nigeria as authorities intensify security efforts.

articles.title: Economic Reforms Remain Priority
articles.description: Government attention remains focused on inflation, infrastructure development, electricity supply, food security and economic reforms.

articles.title: African Trade And Investment Grow
articles.description: African countries continue strengthening regional trade, transportation corridors and investment partnerships to support long-term economic development.

articles.title: Asia Advances Digital Innovation
articles.description: Governments across Asia continue investing in artificial intelligence, digital infrastructure and advanced manufacturing technologies.

articles.title: Markets Watch Inflation And Energy Prices
articles.description: Investors begin the week monitoring inflation data, central bank policy expectations and developments in global energy markets.

articles.title: Artificial Intelligence Investment Accelerates
articles.description: Technology companies and governments continue expanding investment in AI, cloud computing, robotics and cybersecurity.

breakingHistory: Norway defeated Brazil 2-1 to reach the FIFA World Cup quarter-finals.
France defeated Paraguay 1-0 to continue their unbeaten campaign.
Morocco eliminated Canada to advance to the quarter-finals.
Portugal face Spain while USA meet Belgium today.
Europe remains under severe heatwave warnings.
Global markets continue monitoring inflation and oil prices.
Artificial intelligence investment continues expanding worldwide.
The FIFA World Cup Round of 16 continues with two major fixtures today.
